mapper.select: SELECT MIN(s.id) as id, s.operator_id, oi.operator_name as operator_name, oi.country as country, oi.region as region, oi.network_type as network_type, s.data_month, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE700M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as lte_700M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE700M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as lte_700M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE800M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as lte_800M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE800M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as lte_800M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE900M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as lte_900M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE900M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as lte_900M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1400M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as lte_1400M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1400M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as lte_1400M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1800M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as lte_1800M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1800M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as lte_1800M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2100M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as lte_2100M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2100M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as lte_2100M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2600M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as lte_2600M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2600M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as lte_2600M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR700M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_700M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR700M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_700M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR800M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_800M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR800M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_800M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR900M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_900M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR900M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_900M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1400M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_1400M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1400M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_1400M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1800M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_1800M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1800M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_1800M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2100M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_2100M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2100M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_2100M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2600M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_2600M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2600M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_2600M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR3500M_TDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_3500M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR3500M_TDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_3500M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR4900M_TDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_4900M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR4900M_TDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_4900M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2300M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_2300M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2300M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_2300M_cell, SUM(CASE WHEN b.band_code LIKE 'LTE%' THEN s.site_num ELSE 0 END) as lte_total_site, SUM(CASE WHEN b.band_code LIKE 'LTE%' THEN s.cell_num ELSE 0 END) as lte_total_cell, SUM(CASE WHEN b.band_code LIKE 'NR%' THEN s.site_num ELSE 0 END) as nr_total_site, SUM(CASE WHEN b.band_code LIKE 'NR%' THEN s.cell_num ELSE 0 END) as nr_total_cell, SUM(s.site_num) as total_site, SUM(s.cell_num) as total_cell, NOW() as created_time, NOW() as updated_time FROM site_info s JOIN band_info b ON s.band_id = b.id JOIN operator_info oi ON s.operator_id = oi.id WHERE s.data_month = ( SELECT MAX(s2.data_month) FROM site_info s2 WHERE s2.operator_id = s.operator_id ) GROUP BY s.operator_id, s.data_month ORDER BY oi.operator_name

SELECT MIN(s.id) as id, s.operator_id, oi.operator_name as operator_name, oi.country as country, oi.region as region, oi.network_type as network_type, s.data_month, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE700M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as lte_700M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE700M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as lte_700M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE800M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as lte_800M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE800M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as lte_800M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE900M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as lte_900M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE900M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as lte_900M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1400M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as lte_1400M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1400M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as lte_1400M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1800M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as lte_1800M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1800M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as lte_1800M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2100M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as lte_2100M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2100M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as lte_2100M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2600M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as lte_2600M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2600M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as lte_2600M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR700M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_700M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR700M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_700M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR800M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_800M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR800M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_800M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR900M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_900M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR900M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_900M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1400M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_1400M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1400M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_1400M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1800M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_1800M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1800M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_1800M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2100M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_2100M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2100M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_2100M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2600M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_2600M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2600M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_2600M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR3500M_TDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_3500M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR3500M_TDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_3500M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR4900M_TDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_4900M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR4900M_TDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_4900M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2300M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_2300M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2300M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_2300M_cell, SUM(CASE WHEN b.band_code LIKE 'LTE%' THEN s.site_num ELSE 0 END) as lte_total_site, SUM(CASE WHEN b.band_code LIKE 'LTE%' THEN s.cell_num ELSE 0 END) as lte_total_cell, SUM(CASE WHEN b.band_code LIKE 'NR%' THEN s.site_num ELSE 0 END) as nr_total_site, SUM(CASE WHEN b.band_code LIKE 'NR%' THEN s.cell_num ELSE 0 END) as nr_total_cell, SUM(s.site_num) as total_site, SUM(s.cell_num) as total_cell, NOW() as created_time, NOW() as updated_time FROM site_info s JOIN band_info b ON s.band_id = b.id JOIN operator_info oi ON s.operator_id = oi.id WHERE s.operator_id = #{operatorId} AND s.data_month = ( SELECT MAX(s2.data_month) FROM site_info s2 WHERE s2.operator_id = #{operatorId} ) GROUP BY s.operator_id, s.data_month

SELECT MIN(s.id) as id, s.operator_id, oi.operator_name as operator_name, oi.country as country, oi.region as region, oi.network_type as network_type, s.data_month, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE700M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as lte_700M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE700M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as lte_700M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE800M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as lte_800M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE800M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as lte_800M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE900M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as lte_900M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE900M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as lte_900M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1400M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as lte_1400M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1400M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as lte_1400M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1800M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as lte_1800M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1800M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as lte_1800M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2100M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as lte_2100M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2100M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as lte_2100M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2600M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as lte_2600M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2600M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as lte_2600M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR700M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_700M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR700M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_700M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR800M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_800M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR800M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_800M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR900M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_900M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR900M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_900M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1400M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_1400M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1400M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_1400M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1800M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_1800M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1800M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_1800M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2100M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_2100M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2100M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_2100M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2600M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_2600M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2600M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_2600M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR3500M_TDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_3500M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR3500M_TDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_3500M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR4900M_TDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_4900M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR4900M_TDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_4900M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2300M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_2300M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2300M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_2300M_cell, SUM(CASE WHEN b.band_code LIKE 'LTE%' THEN s.site_num ELSE 0 END) as lte_total_site, SUM(CASE WHEN b.band_code LIKE 'LTE%' THEN s.cell_num ELSE 0 END) as lte_total_cell, SUM(CASE WHEN b.band_code LIKE 'NR%' THEN s.site_num ELSE 0 END) as nr_total_site, SUM(CASE WHEN b.band_code LIKE 'NR%' THEN s.cell_num ELSE 0 END) as nr_total_cell, SUM(s.site_num) as total_site, SUM(s.cell_num) as total_cell, NOW() as created_time, NOW() as updated_time FROM site_info s JOIN band_info b ON s.band_id = b.id JOIN operator_info oi ON s.operator_id = oi.id WHERE s.operator_id = #{operatorId} GROUP BY s.operator_id, s.data_month ORDER BY s.data_month DESC

SELECT MIN(s.id) as id, s.operator_id, oi.operator_name as operator_name, oi.country as country, oi.region as region, oi.network_type as network_type, s.data_month, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE700M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as lte_700M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE700M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as lte_700M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE800M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as lte_800M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE800M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as lte_800M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE900M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as lte_900M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE900M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as lte_900M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1400M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as lte_1400M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1400M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as lte_1400M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1800M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as lte_1800M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1800M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as lte_1800M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2100M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as lte_2100M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2100M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as lte_2100M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2600M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as lte_2600M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2600M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as lte_2600M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR700M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_700M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR700M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_700M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR800M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_800M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR800M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_800M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR900M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_900M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR900M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_900M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1400M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_1400M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1400M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_1400M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1800M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_1800M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1800M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_1800M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2100M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_2100M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2100M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_2100M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2600M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_2600M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2600M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_2600M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR3500M_TDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_3500M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR3500M_TDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_3500M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR4900M_TDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_4900M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR4900M_TDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_4900M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2300M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_2300M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2300M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_2300M_cell, SUM(CASE WHEN b.band_code LIKE 'LTE%' THEN s.site_num ELSE 0 END) as lte_total_site, SUM(CASE WHEN b.band_code LIKE 'LTE%' THEN s.cell_num ELSE 0 END) as lte_total_cell, SUM(CASE WHEN b.band_code LIKE 'NR%' THEN s.site_num ELSE 0 END) as nr_total_site, SUM(CASE WHEN b.band_code LIKE 'NR%' THEN s.cell_num ELSE 0 END) as nr_total_cell, SUM(s.site_num) as total_site, SUM(s.cell_num) as total_cell, NOW() as created_time, NOW() as updated_time FROM site_info s JOIN band_info b ON s.band_id = b.id JOIN operator_info oi ON s.operator_id = oi.id WHERE s.data_month = #{dataMonth} GROUP BY s.operator_id, s.data_month ORDER BY oi.operator_name

SELECT MIN(s.id) as id, s.operator_id, oi.operator_name as operator_name, oi.country as country, oi.region as region, oi.network_type as network_type, s.data_month, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE700M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as lte_700M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE700M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as lte_700M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE800M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as lte_800M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE800M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as lte_800M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE900M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as lte_900M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE900M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as lte_900M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1400M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as lte_1400M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1400M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as lte_1400M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1800M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as lte_1800M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE1800M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as lte_1800M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2100M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as lte_2100M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2100M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as lte_2100M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2600M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as lte_2600M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'LTE2600M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as lte_2600M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR700M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_700M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR700M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_700M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR800M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_800M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR800M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_800M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR900M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_900M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR900M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_900M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1400M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_1400M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1400M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_1400M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1800M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_1800M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR1800M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_1800M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2100M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_2100M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2100M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_2100M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2600M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_2600M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2600M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_2600M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR3500M_TDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_3500M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR3500M_TDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_3500M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR4900M_TDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_4900M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR4900M_TDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_4900M_cell, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2300M_FDD' THEN s.site_num END), 0) as nr_2300M_site, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN b.band_code = 'NR2300M_FDD' THEN s.cell_num END), 0) as nr_2300M_cell, SUM(CASE WHEN b.band_code LIKE 'LTE%' THEN s.site_num ELSE 0 END) as lte_total_site, SUM(CASE WHEN b.band_code LIKE 'LTE%' THEN s.cell_num ELSE 0 END) as lte_total_cell, SUM(CASE WHEN b.band_code LIKE 'NR%' THEN s.site_num ELSE 0 END) as nr_total_site, SUM(CASE WHEN b.band_code LIKE 'NR%' THEN s.cell_num ELSE 0 END) as nr_total_cell, SUM(s.site_num) as total_site, SUM(s.cell_num) as total_cell, NOW() as created_time, NOW() as updated_time FROM site_info s JOIN band_info b ON s.band_id = b.id JOIN operator_info oi ON s.operator_id = oi.id WHERE s.operator_id = #{operatorId} AND s.data_month = #{dataMonth} GROUP BY s.operator_id, s.data_month
